{{Short description|2007 Italian film festival edition}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 64th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival64poster.jpg |image_alt = |image_size = 249px |caption = Festival poster |opening = ''[[Atonement (2007 film)|Atonement]]'' |closing = ''[[Blood Brothers (2007 Chinese film)|Blood Brothers]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awardsreceived = |awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Lust, Caution]]'' |artistic_director= Marco Müller |host = [[Ambra Angiolini]] |number = |date = 29 August – 8 September 2007 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[63rd Venice International Film Festival|63rd]] | followed_by = [[65th Venice International Film Festival|65th]] }} The '''64th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''', was held from 29 August to 8 September 2007, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]]. Chinese filmmaker [[Zhang Yimou]] was the jury president for the main competition. Italian actress [[Ambra Angiolini]] was the Host of the opening and closing ceremonies. The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Lust, Caution]]'' by [[Ang Lee]], marking his second win after ''[[Brokeback Mountain]]'' (2005). American filmmaker [[Tim Burton]] received the [[Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement]] during the festival. Once again all the films running the contest were shown for the first time as world premieres in keeping with the festival tradition since the [[Second World War]].{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/ |title=64th Venice International Film Festival |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070923021641/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/ |archive-date=2007-09-23 |access-date=2018-05-21 }}{{cite web|url=http://www.americancinemapapers.com/files/VENICE_2007.htm|title=VENICE 2007 – THE 64TH MOSTRA DEL CINEMA|access-date=October 6, 2013}}{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=503&lang=en|title=The 2000s|date=19 April 2010 |access-date=October 8, 2013}} The festival opened with ''[[Atonement (2007 film)|Atonement]]'' by [[Joe Wright]], and the closed with ''[[Blood Brothers (2007 Chinese film)|Blood Brothers]]'' by Alexi Tan. ==Juries== === Main Competition (''Venezia 64'') === *[[Zhang Yimou]], Chinese filmmaker, producer and actor - Jury President{{cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/ |title=64th Venice Film Festival – International Juries of the 64th Venice Film Festival |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20071003021605/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/ |archive-date=3 October 2007 |df=dmy}}{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en|title=Juries for the 2000s|access-date=8 October 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170804133752/http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en|archive-date=4 August 2017|url-status=dead}} *[[Catherine Breillat]], French filmmaker, novelist and professor of auteur cinema *[[Jane Campion]], New Zealand filmmaker and producer *[[Emanuele Crialese]], Italian filmmaker *[[Alejandro González Iñárritu]], Mexican filmmaker and producer *[[Ferzan Özpetek]], Turkish-Italian filmmaker *[[Paul Verhoeven]], Dutch filmmaker and producer === Horizons (''Orizzonti'') === *[[Gregg Araki]], American filmmaker - Castellari]] |- ! colspan="4" |Retrospective events |- | colspan="2" |''Una Questione poco privata – Conversazione con Giulio Questi'' (2007) |[[Gianfranco Pannone]] |Italy |- |''The Fort of Death'' (1969) |''五人の賞金稼ぎ'' |[[Eiichi Kudo]] |Japan |} ===New Versions Restored=== As a pre-opening event of this future section, the restored Digital Cinema version of [[David Wark Griffith]]’s ''[[Intolerance (film)|Intolerance]]'' (1916) was screened as a world premiere, in collaboration with the Le Giornate del Cinema Muto di Pordenone.{{cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/en/77920.1.html |title=64th Venice Film Festival – The restored version of David Wark Griffith's Intolerance (1916) |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20071003021436/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/en/77920.1.html |archive-date=3 October 2007 |df=dmy}} "Venice Classics" which features restored classic films and documentaries on cinema, started as a new section in 2012, at the [[69th Venice International Film Festival]]. ==Independents Sections== ===Venice International Film Critics' Week=== The following feature films were selected to be screened as ''In Competition'' for the 22nd Venice International Film Critics’ Week:{{cite web |url=http://www.sicvenezia.it/edizione/22-settimana-internazionale-della-critica/?lang=en |title=22nd International Film Critics' Week |work=sicvenezia.it |access-date=6 April 2018 |archive-date=7 April 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180407115753/http://www.sicvenezia.it/edizione/22-settimana-internazionale-della-critica/?lang=en |url-status=dead }} {| class="wikitable" style="width:95%; margin-bottom:0px" |- ! English title ! Original title ! Director(s) !
